recent_excerpts: A critical vulnerability in the Flowise AI platform and other frameworks using Anthropic's Model Context Protocol (MCP) enables remote code execution.

Boost Security's SmokedMeat framework executes live attack demonstrations from a single CI/CD pipeline flaw, showing engineering teams exactly how attackers move to compromise code, secrets, and infra
Socket identified 108 malicious Chrome extensions that infected 20,000 users, stealing Google and Telegram session cookies and injecting ads via a shared command-and-control server.
